Package neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline.twophasepipe.reporting

Class TwoFluidPipeReport.ProfileSnapshot

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline.twophasepipe.reporting.TwoFluidPipeReport.ProfileSnapshot
Enclosing class:
TwoFluidPipeReport
public static final class TwoFluidPipeReport.ProfileSnapshot extends Object
Immutable snapshot of the profile arrays at one simulation time.
